findings.message: Missing alt attribute on : screen readers cannot describe the image content, violating WCAG 2.1 SC 1.1.1.
findings.suggestion: Add a descriptive alt attribute, e.g. alt="Items catalogue banner". If the image is purely decorative, use alt="" to hide it from assistive technologies.

If the image is purely decorative, use alt=\"\" to hide it from assistive technologies."}]
